description: Style Note Simple, understated and undeniably hot: that's the USP of the label roxy. The colours and style add a feminine charm to their range of T-shirts. Team this one with jeans, capris or shorts, and look effortlessly great! Product Details Black top, has a round neckline, short sleeves and graphic print in front Material and Care 100% cotton Wash and iron inside out Do not bleach or tumble dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
